author: callithyia
name: 11L Int5 GPTQ + Order-12 N-gram + Phrase Cache + 65K Chunks
blurb: Fully-trained 11L 512d base model (pre-quant 1.14 BPB) with order-12 backoff n-gram cache, long phrase cache, entropy-adaptive alpha, temperature sharpening (T=0.85), and 65K-token chunks. Full Hessian GPTQ int5 + LZMA. Eval approach from PR #913 adapted with 65K chunk size for properly trained models where 131K exceeds eval budget.
